title: phegopteris yigongensis
intro: Phegopteris yigongensis, a species of fern, is a type of vascular plant belonging to the family Thelypteridaceae. It is traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Phegopteris yigongensis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and promote the healing of wounds. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of a tea or decoction, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
